title: Software Engineer Backend
description:
**Company Description**
 HyperBlu Labs is revolutionizing how top\\-tier technical teams are formed. By blending AI technology with expert human insights, HyperBlu Labs connects YC\\-backed and early\\-stage AI startups with highly skilled engineers, machine learning specialists, and product leaders.
   

  

**Role Description**
 This is a full\\-time located in India, for a Software Engineer specializing in backend development. You will be responsible for designing, developing, and optimizing server\\-side components, APIs, and databases. Day\\-to\\-day tasks will include writing clean and efficient code, troubleshooting backend systems, developing scalable services, collaborating with cross\\-functional teams, and ensuring the integration of backend elements with front\\-end components. The role requires a strong focus on problem\\-solving and innovation.
   

  

**Qualifications**
* 3 to 5 years software engineering experience, backend heavy
* Deep backend: APIs, distributed systems, data pipelines, ETL, architecture
* Full\\-stack willingness across frontend and backend
* CS degree from top IIT strongly preferred
* High\\-output, self\\-directed, comfortable with high\\-intensity pace
* Experience with scalable system architecture and performance optimization for backend services
* Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Engineering, or a related field, or equivalent professional experience
* Strong problem\\-solving skills and the ability to work collaboratively in a cross\\-functional team
* Familiarity with the startup ecosystem and an interest in emerging AI technologies
* Willing to work at a high\\-intensity pace, 6 days a week, with long hours depending on the season

title: C++ Developer
description:
**Senior Software Engineer – Backend (C\\+\\+)** 




**Location:** 
 Pune, India
 



**Reporting to:** 
 Team / Tech Lead – Software Development, FLX ONE Cargo
 



  





**About Accelya** 




 Accelya is a global leader in airline software, supporting over 200 airlines worldwide with an open, modular platform that enables modern airline retailing. The FLX ONE platform supports airlines across Offer, Order, Settlement, and Delivery (OOSD), aligned with IATA standards for modern retailing. Built on a cloud\\-native AWS infrastructure and backed by more than 40 years of airline industry expertise, Accelya helps airlines modernise operations, improve customer experience, and scale with confidence.
 



  





**Role Context** 




 As a Senior Software Engineer – Backend (C\\+\\+), you are a high\\-impact individual contributor building core system\\-level capabilities of FLX ONE Cargo (F1C). This role is centred on deep hands\\-on C\\+\\+ development, systems thinking, and ownership of performance\\-critical components.
 



 You will design and build backend modules that require strong understanding of concurrency, memory management, and performance optimisation. Your influence comes through code quality, technical depth, and engineering judgment.
 



 This is a code\\-first role. You are expected to actively contribute to production systems, solve complex technical problems, and ensure components are efficient, scalable, and reliable under load.
 



  





**Hands\\-On Development \\& Vibe Coding** 



* Design, build, and evolve core FLX ONE Cargo services and APIs using modern enterprise stacks.
* Rapidly prototype, iterate, and refine solutions while maintaining production\\-grade quality.
* Take ownership of complex or high\\-impact components within the codebase.
* Actively participate in debugging, optimisation, and production issue resolution.



  





**Technical Excellence \\& Quality** 



* Write clean, maintainable, and well\\-tested code that others can build upon.
* Perform thoughtful code reviews that raise overall code quality and consistency.
* Apply modular design principles to enable independent evolution and future migration paths.



  





**Operational Ownership** 



* Own the runtime behaviour of the services you build, including reliability and performance.
* Contribute to observability, logging, and alerting to ensure systems are supportable in production.
* Participate in on\\-call or escalation rotations as appropriate.



  





**Collaboration \\& Enablement** 



* Work closely with Tech Leads, Architects, and Product to turn requirements into sound implementations.
* Pair with other engineers to share context, unblock progress, and spread good practices.
* Support early\\-career engineers through example, feedback, and collaboration



  





**What You Must Bring** 



* 5\\+ years of hands\\-on software engineering experience building production systems.
* Strong proficiency in modern C\\+\\+ with experience building backend or system\\-level applications.
* Experience building and operating cloud\\-native services on AWS or equivalent platforms.
* Solid understanding of distributed systems, APIs, and event\\-driven architectures.
* Strong problem\\-solving skills and a high sense of ownership for what you build.



  





**Nice to Have** 



* Experience in airline, cargo, logistics, or other integration\\-heavy enterprise domains.
* Familiarity with modular architectures and incremental migration approaches.
* Exposure to CI/CD pipelines, automated testing, and infrastructure\\-as\\-code.
* Experience using AI\\-assisted development tools to accelerate coding, testing, or debugging.



  





**Why This Role Matters** 




 Senior Software Engineers are the
 **engine room** 
 of FLX ONE Cargo. Your ability to move fast, write high\\-quality code, and take ownership of complex problems directly determines how quickly and safely the platform evolves.
 



  





 Strong hands\\-on C\\+\\+ experience is mandatory.
 



 Profiles without recent C\\+\\+ development experience will not be considered.
 



 Backend experience in other languages without C\\+\\+ depth is not suitable.

title: Engineer - Software Development
description:
**About Us**
 WHY LINEDATA ?
   

  

 Join us in shaping the fintech of tomorrow.
   

  

 With more than 1,350 colleagues across 20 locations worldwide, you'll help build cutting\\-edge platforms and tailored services that power the daily operations of 700 leading financial institutions. As a global, multicultural company with over 45 nationalities represented and just as many languages spoken, we thrive on diverse perspectives and collaboration. Together, we tackle future\\-focused topics like Al and the digitalization of finance, delivering smart solutions for our customers.
   

  

 Whether you're just beginning your career or are an experienced professional, Linedata offers exposure to large\\-scale client projects, internal mobility and opportunities to develop your skills alongside leading experts.
   

  

**The Role**
 As a Software Engineer, You will work with a group of passionate developers spread across two locations
   

  

 (Seattle, WA, \\& Chennai, India) who are all about crafting clean, outstanding, reusable Java code and
   

  

 leveraging tools that make sense all in a fun and supportive working environment. We use the latest
   

  

 technologies and take an incremental agile approach to delivery that keeps you involved and highly engaged with the development team and the business. Come join our team in Chennai, India both to grow yourself
   

  

 professionally as well as to make a great contribution.
   

  

 The Software Engineer \\- offshore will be part of an agile development team, building and working on an
   

  

 enterprise level software system utilizing the JAVA development stack. Our systems need to meet remarkably high standards of quality, performance and reliability, operating around the clock on a large and growing
   

  

 scale.
   

  

**Essential Duties And Responsibilities Requirements**
* Bachelor’s or Masters Degree in Computer Science or Engineering; Master’s degree a plus.
* 3 to 6 years experience with all phases of the software development life cycle, best practices and Agile


 Software Development.
   

  

* Solid OOP and software design knowledge – you should know how to create software that’s extensible,


 reusable and meets desired architectural objectives.
   

  

* A strong familiarity of Web application technologies including Apache, Tomcat and J2EE.
* Work autonomously, excited by new technologies and will never back down from the challenges of scale.
* Experience in developing software using java language.
* Knowing Angular/Ruby and Rails language is a plus.
* Experience working with Linux/UNIX environments
* Experience working in Oracle/SQL server/Postgres database
* Knowledge of web services in REST and SOAP
* Knowledge in Microservice architecture is a plus
* Knowledge in cloud\\-based services is a plus.
* Extensive experience with open\\-source technology, software development and system engineering.
* Excellent communication and organizational skills, and the ability to stay focused on completing tasks


 and meeting goals within a busy workspace.
   

  

* Interest in Cloud Engineering and its impact on greater business practices.
* Skilled at working in tandem with a team of engineers, or alone as required.

title: DEVELOPER L4
description:
Job description:
   

  

 Job Description
 
**Role Purpose** 




 The purpose of this role is to design, test and maintain software programs for operating systems or applications which needs to be deployed at a client end and ensure its meet 100% quality assurance parameters
 


 ͏
 
**Do** 




 1\\. Instrumental in understanding the requirements and design of the product/ software
 


* Develop software solutions by studying information needs, studying systems flow, data usage and work processes
* Investigating problem areas followed by the software development life cycle
* Facilitate root cause analysis of the system issues and problem statement
* Identify ideas to improve system performance and impact availability
* Analyze client requirements and convert requirements to feasible design
* Collaborate with functional teams or systems analysts who carry out the detailed investigation into software requirements
* Conferring with project managers to obtain information on software capabilities


 ͏
 
 2\\. Perform coding and ensure optimal software/ module development
 


* Determine operational feasibility by evaluating analysis, problem definition, requirements, software development and proposed software
* Develop and automate processes for software validation by setting up and designing test cases/scenarios/usage cases, and executing these cases
* Modifying software to fix errors, adapt it to new hardware, improve its performance, or upgrade interfaces.
* Analyzing information to recommend and plan the installation of new systems or modifications of an existing system
* Ensuring that code is error free or has no bugs and test failure
* Preparing reports on programming project specifications, activities and status
* Ensure all the codes are raised as per the norm defined for project / program / account with clear description and replication patterns
* Compile timely, comprehensive and accurate documentation and reports as requested
* Coordinating with the team on daily project status and progress and documenting it
* Providing feedback on usability and serviceability, trace the result to quality risk and report it to concerned stakeholders


 ͏
 
 3\\. Status Reporting and Customer Focus on an ongoing basis with respect to project and its execution
 


* Capturing all the requirements and clarifications from the client for better quality work
* Taking feedback on the regular basis to ensure smooth and on time delivery
* Participating in continuing education and training to remain current on best practices, learn new programming languages, and better assist other team members.
* Consulting with engineering staff to evaluate software\\-hardware interfaces and develop specifications and performance requirements
* Document and demonstrate solutions by developing documentation, flowcharts, layouts, diagrams, charts, code comments and clear code
* Documenting very necessary details and reports in a formal way for proper understanding of software from client proposal to implementation
* Ensure good quality of interaction with customer w.r.t. e\\-mail content, fault report tracking, voice calls, business etiquette etc
* Timely Response to customer requests and no instances of complaints either internally or externally


 ͏
 
**Deliver** 



**No.** 
**Performance Parameter** 
**Measure** 
 1\\.Continuous Integration, Deployment \\& Monitoring of Software100% error free on boarding \\& implementation, throughput %, Adherence to the schedule/ release plan2\\.Quality \\& CSATOn\\-Time Delivery, Manage software, Troubleshoot queries, Customer experience, completion of assigned certifications for skill upgradation3\\.MIS \\& Reporting100% on time MIS \\& report generation
 
  
 







 Mandatory Skills: MS SQL .
 



  
 



 Experience: 5\\-8 Years
   

 .
 



  
 



 Reinvent your world. We are building a modern Wipro. We are an end\\-to\\-end digital transformation partner with the boldest ambitions. To realize them, we need people inspired by reinvention. Of yourself, your career, and your skills. We want to see the constant evolution of our business and our industry. It has always been in our DNA \\- as the world around us changes, so do we. Join a business powered by purpose and a place that empowers you to design your own reinvention.

title: Lead Software Development Engineer
description:
Razorpay is one of India’s leading full\\-stack financial technology companies, powering the way businesses move, manage, and grow money. Founded in 2014 by Harshil Mathur and Shashank Kumar with a simple vision — to simplify payments for Indian businesses — we’ve since grown into a fintech powerhouse driving India’s digital payment revolution.
   

  

 Razorpay powers millions of businesses with a smarter, scalable stack that goes beyond transactions to help them truly build and grow.
   

  

 From seamless checkouts to payroll automation, across India, Singapore, and Malaysia, we’ve been engineering a fintech ecosystem that’s redefining how money moves across Asia — and we’re just getting started.
   

  

 Today, that ecosystem supports everyone from early\\-stage startups to some of India’s largest enterprises, enabling them to accept, process, and disburse payments at scale while expanding into new ways of managing money more efficiently.
   

  

 Our scale speaks volumes: Razorpay processes $180\\+ billion in annualized transactions, powering leading businesses like Airbnb, Facebook, WhatsApp, Airtel, CRED, BookmyShow, Zomato, Swiggy, Lenskart, Mirae Asset Capital markets, Indian Oil, National Pension Scheme — and over 100 of India’s unicorns. With strong roots in India and growing operations in Southeast Asia, we are shaping the next chapter of financial technology across the region.
   

  

 We are backed by global investors including GIC, Peak XV Partners (formerly Sequoia Capital India \\& SEA), Tiger Global, Ribbit Capital, Matrix Partners, MasterCard, and Salesforce Ventures, having raised over $740 million to date. Strategic acquisitions — including Ezetap (POS and offline payments), Curlec (Malaysia expansion), BillMe (digital invoicing), and POP (rewards\\-first UPI) — along with earlier moves in fraud prevention, payroll, and lending, have further strengthened our platform and widened our footprint across Asia.
   

  

 But what truly sets Razorpay apart is our culture. At Razorpay, ownership is our oxygen — you own what you build, with no micromanagement or red tape, just the runway to make your ideas fly. Learning is a lifestyle — if you’re curious, you’ll feel at home here. People \\> Pedigree — we hire for attitude, hustle, and hunger more than degrees. Transparency thrives over titles — this is where interns question CXOs and CXOs say “thank you.” Guided by our values of Customer First, Autonomy \\& Ownership, Agility with Integrity, Transparency, Challenging the status quo and a strong belief that Razorpay grows with Razors, you’ll be part of a 3000\\+ strong team building not just products, but the financial infrastructure of the future.
   

  

**About Corp Engineering**
 Corp Engineering is a newly created function at Razorpay that will redefine how internal tools and employee\\-facing products are built. We will build the products that every Razorpay employee touches daily: HR ticketing, performance management, interview tooling, employee onboarding, internal search. If it makes life better for people inside Razorpay, we build it. We operate with a lean, AI\\-native approach where small teams ship fast and own what they build.
   

  

 Our customers are every single Razorpay employee. You ship something in the morning and hear about it at lunch. The feedback loop is measured in hours, not quarters. That speed of learning is hard to find anywhere else.
   

  

**About The Role**
 This is one of Razorpay’s first true full\\-stack builder roles. You won’t just write code. You’ll own the entire lifecycle from talking to the person who has the problem, to designing the solution, to shipping it and making sure it actually works. You are the PM, the frontend engineer, and the backend engineer, rolled into one. You partner directly with HR, Talent Acquisition, and other teams to build products that thousands of employees use every day.
   

  

 This role is AI\\-native. You use LLMs and agentic workflows as core parts of how you build, not as a side experiment. You write prompts as naturally as you write code. You ship at a pace that would typically need an entire squad. You are a one\\-person team who drives progress relentlessly and independently.
   

  

**What You’ll Build**
* An internal employee platform: a single destination for everything an employee needs at work. Think HR self\\-service, smart onboarding, people directory, AI\\-assisted query resolution, and manager tools, all in one place
* Interview environments: purpose\\-built platforms where candidates work through real scenario\\-based problems that test agency and problem solving, not just DSA on a whiteboard
* Performance management: goal setting, review cycles, calibration dashboards, and tooling that helps managers actually manage
* Internal search: every employee deserves instant access to the right information — policy docs, people, past decisions, Drive files. You’ll build the experience that makes that possible.
* Employee experience products: onboarding workflows, pulse surveys, request management, and self\\-service HR tools


**What We’re Looking For**
* 4–6 years of software engineering experience with strong skills across frontend (React/Next.js) and backend (Python/Django, Ruby/Ruby on Rails/Go)
* You’ve shipped products end\\-to\\-end before, from talking to users all the way to production deployment and monitoring
* Strong product instinct. You can sit with a stakeholder, figure out the real problem, and build the right thing without waiting for a spec
* AI\\-native mindset. You use LLMs and agentic tools daily to write, debug, and ship code. You also build AI into the products you create
* Security awareness. These tools will handle sensitive employee data: performance reviews, compensation, personal information. You understand secure coding practices, data access controls, and why this matters
* Experience with databases (PostgreSQL/MySQL), caching (Redis), messaging queues, and cloud infrastructure (AWS/GCP)
* Bias for action. You prefer shipping over perfecting and iterate quickly based on feedback from colleagues down the hall


**Why This Role is Different**
* You own the full stack and the full product lifecycle. That almost never happens at a company of Razorpay’s scale
* You’re building a new function from the ground up. Your early work will shape how Corp Engineering operates for years
* Your users sit in the same office. You’ll know within days whether what you built actually works
* AI\\-native is not a label. It’s how we build and how we ship 10x faster with lean teams
* Direct visibility with senior leadership. What you build impacts every employee at Razorpay


 Razorpay believes in and follows an equal employment opportunity policy that doesn't discriminate on gender, religion, sexual orientation, colour, nationality, age, etc. We welcome interests and applications from all groups and communities across the globe.
   

  

 Follow us on LinkedIn \\& Twitter
